heading: List of cigarette ingredients; annual submission to Secretary; transmittal to Congress; confidentiality
label: 1335a List of cigarette ingredients; annual submission to Secretary; transmittal to Congress; confidentiality
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 8 and is classified to .section 7 of Pub. L. 89–92section 1336 of this title

Effective Date of 1984 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 98–474, § 5(b)98 Stat. 2204Oct. 12, 1984“Section 7 of the Federal Cigarette Labeling and Advertising Act [this section] added by subsection (a) shall take effect upon the expiration of the one-year period beginning on the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Oct. 12, 1984

L. 98–474, § 5(b)98 Stat. 2204Oct. 12, 1984“Section 7 of the Federal Cigarette Labeling and Advertising Act [this section] added by subsection (a) shall take effect upon the expiration of the one-year period beginning on the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Oct. 12, 1984

children.label: a
children.text: Each person who manufactures, packages, or imports cigarettes shall annually provide the Secretary with a list of the ingredients added to tobacco in the manufacture of cigarettes which does not identify the company which uses the ingredients or the brand of cigarettes which contain the ingredients. A person or group of persons required to provide a list by this subsection may designate an individual or entity to provide the list required by this subsection.

children.label: A
children.text: a summary of research activities and proposed research activities on the health effects of ingredients added to tobacco in the manufacture of cigarettes and the findings of such research;

children.label: B
children.text: information pertaining to any such ingredient which in the judgement of the Secretary poses a health risk to cigarette smokers; and

children.label: C
children.text: any other information which the Secretary determines to be in the public interest.

children.label: A
children.text: Any information provided to the Secretary under subsection (a) shall be treated as trade secret or confidential information subject to and and shall not be revealed, except as provided in paragraph (1), to any person other than those authorized by the Secretary in carrying out their official duties under this section.section 552(b)(4) of title 5section 1905 of title 18

children.label: B
children.text: Subparagraph (A) does not authorize the withholding of a list provided under subsection (a) from any duly authorized subcommittee or committee of the Congress. If a subcommittee or committee of the Congress requests the Secretary to provide it such a list, the Secretary shall make the list available to the subcommittee or committee and shall, at the same time, notify in writing the person who provided the list of such request.

children.label: i
children.text: shall take physical possession of the information and, when not in use by a person authorized to have access to such information, shall store it in a locked cabinet or file, and

children.label: ii
children.text: shall maintain a complete record of any person who inspects or uses the information.
